entries.content: For command/spec contract tightening, pin one cross-surface asset test that reads the authoritative spec JSON plus affected command/agent prompt files. This catches spec-law, workflow, and worker-packet drift without adding a runtime parser when enforcement is intentionally workflow-owned.

`docs/specs/*.md` may be an archive-time generated mirror while `.adv/specs/*/spec.json` is authoritative. Asset tests for strengthened spec body should anchor on `spec.json`; markdown docs can be updated for readability but may not be regenerated by `pnpm run check`.
